overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a rain-soaked beachside promenade past a 'Sidewalk Market' convenience store. The scene features wet reflective pavement, street lighting, palm trees, and distant pier lights while pedestrians walk through the heavy rain.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night along a beachside promenade in GTA V. The camera moves forward past the Sidewalk Market storefront on the left, with wet reflective pavement underfoot and streetlights cutting through the heavy rain. A pedestrian in red shorts is visible in the distance walking toward the camera.

events.description: passes within close proximity of pedestrian in red shorts walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing forward and passing closely by a pedestrian wearing red shorts and dark shirt

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shorts walking past the camera on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as the pedestrian in red shorts approaches and passes by on the right. The Sidewalk Market remains visible on the left while moving toward the mid-ground, and the palm trees become more prominent. The rain continues to fall heavily on the wet pavement.

events.description: Sidewalk Market building exits view on the left, opening up the scene to the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking past the market area and continuing down the open promenade toward the distant pier lights

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pedestrian, the camera moves beyond the Sidewalk Market which exits the frame on the left, opening up the view toward the distant pier lights. The promenade continues with palm trees now closer on the left, and the heavy rain creates reflective pools on the concrete surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked beachside promenade that shifts from a close-up view of a storefront to an open vista of distant pier lights. It begins by gliding past the Sidewalk Market on the left, where streetlights reflect off the wet pavement amidst a heavy downpour. As the camera advances, a pedestrian in red shorts approaches and passes by on the right, while the surrounding palm trees become more prominent in the frame. The scene then opens up as the market storefront exits the view, allowing the perspective to expand toward the glowing lights of a far-off pier. Finally, the camera continues along the concrete promenade, passing closer palm trees and moving through deep reflective pools formed by the persistent rain.
